name: tianming-mobile
description: 天命 Android/平板 Capacitor 壳 — webDir 指向 ../web，与桌面端共享同一套前端源（移植宪法①一套代码库）

scripts.sync: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/stage-web-for-cap.ps1 && cap sync android
scripts.open: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/stage-web-for-cap.ps1 && cap open android
scripts.run: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/stage-web-for-cap.ps1 && cap run android
scripts.add:android: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/stage-web-for-cap.ps1 && cap add android
